args.query: SELECT id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate, status FROM "Case" WHERE createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND createddate <= '2023-09-02' LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate, status FROM "Case" WHERE createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND createddate <= '2023-09-02' LIMIT 10;

args.query: SELECT DISTINCT field__c FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c LIKE '%Owner%' OR field__c LIKE '%Assignment%';

args.query: SELECT id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate FROM "Case" WHERE createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND createddate <= '2023-09-02' AND status = 'Closed';

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate FROM "Case" WHERE createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND createddate <= '2023-09-02' AND status = 'Closed';

args.query: SELECT casehistory.id, casehistory.caseid__c, casehistory.field__c, casehistory.oldvalue__c, casehistory.newvalue__c, casehistory.createddate FROM casehistory__c AS casehistory WHERE casehistory.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' AND casehistory.caseid__c IN (SELECT id FROM "Case" WHERE createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND createddate <= '2023-09-02' AND status = 'Closed') LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT casehistory.id, casehistory.caseid__c, casehistory.field__c, casehistory.oldvalue__c, casehistory.newvalue__c, casehistory.createddate FROM casehistory__c AS casehistory WHERE casehistory.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' AND casehistory.caseid__c IN (SELECT id FROM "Case" WHERE createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND createddate <= '2023-09-02' AND status = 'Closed') LIMIT 20;

args.query:
SELECT 
  c.id AS case_id,
  c.ownerid,
  c.createddate,
  c.closeddate
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' 
  AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02' 
  AND c.status = 'Closed';

exec_args.sql:

  AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02' 
  AND c.status = 'Closed';
